overview.description: The Nuveen High Yield Municipal Income ETF (NHYM) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in high yield fixed income. The fund seeks to provide federal tax-exempt current income through an actively managed portfolio of high-yield US municipal bonds. The fund maintains an overall weighted average maturity of greater than 10 years. NHYM was launched on Jan 22, 2025 and is issued by Nuveen.
